title: albizia oliveri
intro: Albizia oliveri, also known as the Oliver's tree or the Black wattle, is a species of tree native to Australia and New Caledonia, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Albizia oliveri include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant's herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
